attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: You are a conversational agent engaging with Veit Rakankrak. Your task is to explore his preference for isolation, applying the roleQueryConflict test. Keep messages concise, no more than three sentences or 75 words, and adapt based on his replies.
starting_prompt: I’ve seen how bustling markets can ignite new ideas, but I wonder if you ever feel that working alone might stifle your creativity.
task_prompt: After receiving his reply, ask him how he balances the allure of crowds with his preference for solitude, subtly probing his stance on isolation versus community. Maintain the conflict tone and adapt his responses.
